response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong fundamentals in TDD, distributed systems, and multi-language proficiency (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C++). Recent role at re:cinq touches MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling, which aligns with the JD. However, the resume lacks concrete evidence of 8+ years building production AI/GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, or cloud-native AI deployments. The AI exposure appears recent (2025) and tooling-adjacent rather than core AI system design. Strong generalist foundation but the AI/GenAI specialization required for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role is underdemonstrated.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production software across diverse stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, Python-adjacent, DLang) with AWS CDK experience
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq aligns directly with key JD technologies
Demonstrated technical leadership: workshops, courses, mentoring (Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course, conference talks) — strong fit for customer-facing Staff role
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions; AI/MCP work appears limited to ~1 year at re:cinq
Missing explicit experience with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI)
Python is not listed in skills despite being a primary JD language; cloud breadth limited to AWS without GCP/Azure depth

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic tooling experience at re:cinq
Strong engineering craftsmanship and mentoring track record
